name: Inland Real Estate Income Trust, Inc.
summary: PART I General Inland Real Estate Income Trust, Inc. (which we refer to herein as the Company, we, our or us) was formed and sponsored by Inland Real Estate Investment Corporation, referred to herein as our Sponsor or IREIC, on August 24, 2011. IREIC is part of The Inland Real Estate Group of Companies, Inc., which is comprised of independent legal entities that are either subsidiaries of the same entity, affiliates of each other, share some common ownership or have been sponsored and managed by...
